query:
/devops-engineer debug Here's my CI log output showing a failure:

npm ERR! ERESOLVE could not resolve
npm ERR! While resolving: react-scripts@5.0.1
npm ERR! Found: typescript@5.4.0
npm ERR! peer dep: typescript@>=3 && <5 required by react-scripts@5.0.1
expected_behavior: Agent activates devops-engineer in Debug mode
Agent parses the inline log content for errors
Agent runs log-parser.py on the provided log content
Agent classifies the failure as 'dependency' category
Agent identifies root cause: TypeScript version conflict with react-scripts peer dependency
Agent recommends specific fix: pin TypeScript to <5 or upgrade react-scripts
Agent does NOT load entire CI logs into context for large inputs
